title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.400 - Interstate compact for barge traffic development on the Missouri River with Iowa, Kansas, Missouri, Nebraska
text:
237.400.  Interstate compact for barge traffic development on the Missouri River with Iowa, Kansas, Missouri, Nebraska. — Within sixty days of September 28, 1983, the governor shall act to enter into a compact with the states of Iowa, Kansas and Nebraska to read substantially as follows:  
(L. 1983 H.B. 102 § 1)
